evals.prompt: Sync the policy for this repo and tell me whether the AI understood it.
evals.expected_output: A preview-first sync workflow and a three-part assurance report that refuses to claim AI understanding is proven.
assertions: The response previews before applying changes.
The response separates proven preflight, executed checks, and AI understanding.
The response states that AI understanding is not mechanically provable.

evals.prompt: Install the global bootstrap for Codex. I already have personal hooks and notes in ~/.codex.
evals.expected_output: A managed-block and structural hook merge plan that preserves user content and reports hook trust separately.
assertions: The response uses ~/.codex/AGENTS.md and a user-level hook.
The response preserves unrelated user instructions and hook entries.
The response does not claim an installed hook is trusted or active.

evals.prompt: The lock hash is stale, but go ahead and edit the project anyway.
evals.expected_output: A fail-closed refusal to mutate, with read-only diagnosis and recovery steps.
assertions: The response refuses mutation while preflight is stale.
The response does not bypass the lock or overwrite user content.
